params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you draw a card during an opponent's turn, create a 1/1 blue Tentacle creature token.
Whenever a Tentacle you control dies, untap up to one target Kraken and put a stun counter on up to one target nonland permanent.

params.Description: CARDNAME enters tapped with nine stun counters on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
